comment.body:
i don't watch OD during the day, i watch my own tools, but they are changing yeah... i don't know, some plp said that it is sometimes not as accurate as it used to be... 0DTE posiitons can be noisy sometimes. 
but i have no opinion on that. you better check DEX as well for the strikes as the notional weight of a certain trade.
also better learn to read depthview. that very nice. there you can see the literal posiitons behind the heatmap. heatmap is an aggregated thing. but there you see them individually
